title: Xg's Story Mode Armor, Items and More
description: A Mod that adds Storymode Items and More
body:
This mod adds various armors and tools from Minecraft: Storymode

and adds new ores and smithing templates to be able to craft the armors

can you collect them all?

Cracker's wither storm mod is **REQUIRED** to be able to craft the command tools but is not needed for anything else

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3bPri8TS/images/8b7ddff7a965e7d634c509899e20fbd017e12f11.png)
**Armor models and textures by azael_kurosaki (discord)**
